query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS critical_event_alerts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  eventId INT NOT NULL,
  deliveryMethod ENUM('EMAIL', 'DASHBOARD_BANNER', 'DASHBOARD_NOTIFICATION', 'SLACK', 'TEAMS') NOT NULL,
  userId INT NULL,
  status ENUM('PENDING', 'SENT', 'DELIVERED', 'FAILED', 'BOUNCED') DEFAULT 'PENDING' NOT NULL,
  errorMessage TEXT NULL,
  sentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  deliveredAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX eventId_idx (eventId),
  INDEX userId_idx (userId),
  INDEX status_idx (status)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
command:

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS critical_event_alerts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  eventId INT NOT NULL,
  deliveryMethod ENUM('EMAIL', 'DASHBOARD_BANNER', 'DASHBOARD_NOTIFICATION', 'SLACK', 'TEAMS') NOT NULL,
  userId INT NULL,
  status ENUM('PENDING', 'SENT', 'DELIVERED', 'FAILED', 'BOUNCED') DEFAULT 'PENDING' NOT NULL,
  errorMessage TEXT NULL,
  sentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  deliveredAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX eventId_idx (eventId),
  INDEX userId_idx (userId),
  INDEX status_idx (status)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
